articles.title: Meta’s Oversight Board says account bans lack due process, transparency
articles.description: Meta's board cites "due process" concerns over account bans. It's also pushing Meta to offer clear information about violations and its use in AI in making its determinations.

articles.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
articles.description: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

articles.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
articles.description: Apple's WWDC nears: here's what you can look forward to.

articles.title: A burglar used a Waymo to steal yoga clothes in San Francisco — and got away with it
articles.description: The incident helps shed some new light on how Waymo treats and stores the footage captured by its robotaxis.

articles.title: Cash App launches a wand for tap-and-pay
articles.description: Cash App plans to launch more tap-to-pay tags

articles.title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage
articles.description: The company announced a deal with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose the battery packs as Waymo pulls them off the road.

articles.title: Ramp raises $750M at $44B valuation as investors hunger for fintechs with an AI story
articles.description: Ramp has nearly tripled its valuation over the past year as investors scramble to grab a part of the fast-growing startup.

articles.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
articles.description: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

articles.title: Chinese spies are using LinkedIn to lure Westerners into sharing sensitive information
articles.description: The advisory warns that Chinese spies are using public job search platforms to recruit people with access to non-public information.

articles.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
articles.description: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

articles.title: Oura Ring 5 review: Thinner, lighter, better
articles.description: The Ring 5, which Oura describes as the world’s smallest smart ring, is 40% smaller than its predecessor and starts at $399.

articles.title: Benchmark raises its first-ever growth fund as part of $2B capital haul
articles.description: The legendary Silicon Valley VC firm abandons its more than 20-year tradition of keeping its funds to about $425 million.

articles.title: Quick-commerce FirstClub doubles valuation to $255M in 9 months
articles.description: The Bengaluru startup has crossed 1 million orders and reached a $50 million annualized GMV run rate within a year of launch.

articles.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
articles.description: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

articles.title: Defense tech is flooded with money, but who’s built to last?
articles.description: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. A wave of new startups is chasing those government contracts, but according to Ross Fubini, the venture investor who wrote Anduril’s first check, most of them will get lost in the Valley of Death between prototype contract […]

articles.title: Uber to put 500 data-collection vehicles on the road this year
articles.description: The modified Ioniq 5 will be loaded with sensors to capture data for Uber's new AV Labs division.

articles.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
articles.description: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

articles.title: Meta mercifully spun out VR fitness game Supernatural instead of just killing it
articles.description: Meta appears to have listened to the Supernatural users who protested the app's sad fate after sweeping layoffs.

articles.description: Substack's new Reply Rules feature is currently available for all English-language publications and is designed to give creators greater control over how their audiences respond.

articles.title: How some data center operators are tackling their water use problems

articles.description: Lawsuit: Ring cameras scan guests and passersby and use AI to identify faces.

articles.title: If I had a hammer... it might actually be a rhino tooth
articles.description: Neanderthals had some wild stuff in their toolkits.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **Meta监管与AI进展**：Meta监督委员会批评其账户封禁缺乏正当程序和透明度；同时，Meta在Facebook推出新的AI创作者助手。
2. **苹果WWDC与财务亮点**：WWDC 2026将聚焦Siri重大改版和Apple Intelligence更新；苹果宣布App Store累计交易额达1.4万亿美元，其中90%未收取佣金。
3. **自动驾驶与能源创新**：Waymo旧金山发生小偷利用自动驾驶出租车盗窃事件；Waymo还将退役的Robotaxi电池用于电网储能。
4. **金融科技与AI投资热潮**：Ramp以440亿美元估值融资7.5亿美元，投资者追捧AI驱动的金融科技；快速电商FirstClub在9个月内估值翻倍至2.55亿美元。
5. **安全与机器人应用**：中国间谍被曝利用LinkedIn诱骗西方人分享敏感信息；Hello Robot公司正推动家用机器人进入硅谷家庭。

**今日最值得关注**：苹果Siri的重大改版与AI功能更新，以及Waymo电池创新再利用，分别代表了消费科技与绿色能源领域的突破方向。

articles.description: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **Hugging Face密集发布多项AI技术更新**：包括Nemotron 3.5 ASR语音识别微调、EVA-Bench 2.0多工具场景数据集、Holo3.1本地化计算机使用智能体、JetBrains的12B MoE模型Mellum2，以及面向企业级AI的智能体逻辑讨论，覆盖语音、工具调用、模型优化与部署全链条。

2. **Google AI聚焦Gemini模型应用与创意实践**：发布Gemini 3.5及Omni的9个实际演示、I/O 2026大会的Gemini构建经验、AI Studio代码生成测试，以及Futures Lab原型展示，强调AI在搜索、购物和开发中的落地场景。

3. **OpenAI与Endava合作推动AI智能体重塑软件交付**：展示如何利用AI智能体重新设计软件交付流程，突出企业级AI从模型能力向可扩展智能体逻辑转型的趋势。

4. **PyTorch推出性能分析入门指南**：发布torch.profiler初学者教程，为开发者提供模型调优的基础工具。

5. **MCP工具集成至机器人平台**：Reachy Mini机器人新增MCP工具支持，拓展AI在物理世界交互中的能力边界。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Hugging Face与Google AI同时强调从“纯语言模型”向“智能体+工具+场景”的演进，标志着AI行业正加速从对话式应用转向可执行复杂任务的自主智能体生态。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **国际关系与地缘政治**：比利时半数民众视美国为比中国更大的对手；中国在南海问题上的立场引发关注，有报道称“趁能拿就拿”成为新现实；欧盟拟加入美国主导的芯片联盟“Pax Silica”以应对中国AI发展；中国被指有对金门“兼并”的蓝图。

2. **科技与军事发展**：中国新型神秘潜艇亮相，显示水下扩张加速；中国接连发射可重复使用的大型火箭（如长征12B），并成功部署“千帆”卫星；中国警方扩大智能眼镜使用范围。

3. **经济与产业动态**：更多美国企业转向中国AI公司DeepSeek，以替代昂贵的硅谷AI服务；中国在药物研发领域崛起，对美国构成竞争压力；中国培育钻石因AI热潮意外受益。

4. **社会民生与人口流动**：中国正低调改善农村移民的生活条件；有报道对比中印发展差异，分析中国为何致富而印度未达同等水平。

5. **安全与健康议题**：除美国外，中国顶尖科学家也接连神秘死亡，引发对科研安全环境的关注。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在可重复使用火箭领域的快速进展，以及美国企业转向中国AI服务，凸显中国在高端科技和产业替代方面的持续突破。
